title: Label Type
Description
Example
table-209-209.pgTitle: Common Atomic Labels in Hydrogen Atoms
table-209-209.caption: Which type of label is the most numerous in atoms with hydrogen?
data: Atoms with the same number of protons but different numbers of neutrons.
Atom or molecule with a net electric charge due to the loss or gain of electrons.
Atom in which one or more electrons has absorbed energy and moved to a higher energy level.
Elemental hydrogen that exists as single atoms rather than hydrogen molecules (H₂).
Relates to the spin states of the nuclei in diatomic hydrogen (H₂). Exists for single atoms too.
Ortho-Hydrogen has parallel spins. Para-Hydrogen has antiparallel spins.
